transactions.desc: The White Sox selected Sandlin's contract from Triple-A Charlotte on Tuesday.
The Mets selected Wagaman's contract from Triple-A Syracuse on Tuesday.
The Mets optioned Pintaro to Triple-A Syracuse on Tuesday.
The Mets optioned Morabito to Triple-A Syracuse on Tuesday.
The Mets activated Young (knee) from the 10-day injured list Tuesday.
The Mets activated Minter (lat) from the 60-day injured list Tuesday.
The Orioles recalled Raquet from Triple-A Norfolk on Tuesday.
The Orioles designated Enns for assignment Tuesday.
The Mariners optioned Davila to Triple-A Tacoma on Tuesday.
The Mariners activated Speier (shoulder) from the 15-day injured list Tuesday.
The Guardians selected Dion's contract from Triple-A Columbus on Tuesday.
The Rays signed Kimbrel to a one-year contract Tuesday, Ken Rosenthal of The Athletic reports.
The Cubs outrighted Lopez to Triple-A Iowa on Monday.
Kimbrel elected free agency Monday.
The Colorado Rockies traded LHP Carson Palmquist to the Washington Nationals.
The Blue Jays selected Andrews' contract from Triple-A Buffalo on Monday.
The Rockies recalled Herrera from Triple-A Albuquerque on Monday.
The Cardinals optioned Mautz to Triple-A Memphis on Monday, Derrick Goold of the St. Louis Post-Dispatch reports.
The Dodgers designated Espinal for assignment Monday.
The Dodgers activated Hernandez (elbow) from the 60-day injured list Monday.
The Blue Jays optioned Schneider to Triple-A Buffalo on Monday.
The Blue Jays activated Lukes (hamstring) from the 10-day injured list Monday.
The Guardians recalled Heuer from Triple-A Columbus on Monday.
The Twins optioned Gonzalez to Triple-A St. Paul on Monday, Dan Hayes of The Athletic reports.
The Twins activated Gray from the paternity leave list Monday, Dan Hayes of The Athletic reports.
The White Sox selected Nishida's contract from Triple-A Charlotte on Monday.
The White Sox designated Kelenic for assignment Monday.
The Tigers optioned Sommers to Triple-A Toledo on Monday.
The Reds optioned Petty to Triple-A Louisville on Sunday.
Suarez was designated for assignment by the Orioles on Sunday, Jake Rill of MLB.com reports.
